chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI High Court Appeal No. 126 of 2022 ____________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE ____________________________________________________________ 1. For hearing of main case. 2. For hearing of CMA No. 970/2022. 01.12.2025 None present for the Appellant. Mr. Ali Haider, advocate holding brief for Mr. Kashif Hanif, advocate for respondent. Ms. Zehrah Sehr Vayani, Assistant Attorney General. Mr. Raja Love Kush, Deputy Manager (Legal), SSGC. This appeal is pending since 2022. Appellant remains unrepresented today without intimation or justification. It appears that the appellant is not interested in proceeding with this appeal, therefore, the same is dismissed for non-prosecution. Judge Judge Ayaz P.S.
